roa.docketEntryComment: /X:DEFENDANT SENTENCED ON COUNT 3 AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH3:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 2D/CTS: 2/WS/DNA/X:DEFENDANT IS DNA COMPLIANT,/CTORD:DEFENDANT HAS TO PAY RESTITUTION TO VICTIM IN THE AMOUNT OF $82,474,01 IN FULL BEFORE THE EXPIRATION OF PROBATION,/X:IF RESTITUTION IS NOT SATISFIED IN FULL WITHIN THE 5 YEAR PROBATION, THEN PROBATION SHALL BE EXTENDED,/X:DEFENDANT TO PAY A MINIMUM OF $1200,00 (OR 50% OF MONTHLY INCOME WHICHEVER IS GREATER) ON THE 1ST OFEACH MONTH, NO LATER THAN THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH WITH COPY OF PAYSTUB,/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, THE COURT WILL IMPOSE THE 10% ACCRUED INTERESTFROM TIME OF SENTENCING,/X:DEFENDANT HAS MADE A PAYMENT OF $5000,00 TODAYIN COURT,/X:CR-115 (DEFENDANT'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS) FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:CR-110-JV-790 AND CR-119 FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:ORDER REGARDING COLLECTION OF RESTITUTION PAYMENTS FILED IN OPEN COURT,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/X:AS TO COUNTS 1, 2 AND 4, CHARGES ARE REDUCED PURSUANTTO PC17B(5),/FAWC/IRRC/X:DEFENDANT SENTENCED TO 2 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 2 DAYS CTS ON COUNTS 1, 2, AND 4,/CCC:1, 2, 3, 4 (AS TO CJ SENTENCE)/X:VF1, SECFEE, ICNA IMPOSED ON COUNTS 1, 2, AND 4 (MISDEMEANOR COUNTS),/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION DIRECTLY TO VICTIM/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1,2,3 & 4/TWS/X:IF DEFENDANT PAYS $5000 TO VICTIM TOWARD RESTITUTION BY DAY OF SENTENCE COUNT 1,2 & 4 FELONY CHARGE WILL BE REDUCE TO MISD/X:THIS IS A PLEA OPEN TO JUDGE DEKREON/X:DEFENDANT ADMIT ALLEGATIONS INCOMPLAINT/X:RESTITUTION HRG CONDUCTED AND COURT DETERMINES RESTITUTION OWED IS $82,474,01/WIT SWORN DA:STANLEY CORRIEA JR & NANCY CORRIEA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 05-01-09/
